name: claude-wall-monitor
description: Registers cwm-mcp — the local broker for the Claude Wall Monitor ESP32 device. Provides four diagnostic tools (wall_monitor_status, wall_monitor_health, wall_monitor_recent_logs, wall_monitor_provision_hint) and runs alongside Claude Code with leader-elected coexistence so multiple sessions and an existing systemd daemon don't fight over the broker port. Requires the cwm-mcp binary to be installed and on PATH (go install github.com/fractal-manifold/cwm-mcp/cmd/cwm-mcp@latest).
